expectations.text: Uses the prior conversation as context instead of restarting requirement discovery from scratch
expectations.evidence: It explicitly says it will not restart and continues from the existing approval-center context.

expectations.text: Provides a pre-generation review that separates confirmed points from unresolved or risky items
expectations.evidence: It separates confirmed information from non-blocking gaps, proposed defaults, and unresolved details.

expectations.text: Asks explicitly whether to begin final downstream-prompt generation instead of generating immediately after '差不多了'
expectations.evidence: It offers a direct handoff: either generate now with stated defaults or answer one last point first.

eval_feedback.overall: The new late-stage branch works here: review first, defaults explicit, and authorization is requested before generation.
